result.stdout:
Description:
  NuGet Scanner CLI

Usage:
  Mateus.Tech.NuGetScanner [options]

Options:
  --project <project>   The path to the solution or project file to scan.
  --include-prerelease  Include pre-release versions in the scan.
  --version             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  NuGet Scanner CLI

Usage:
  Mateus.Tech.NuGetScanner [options]

Options:
  --project <project>   The path to the solution or project file to scan.
  --include-prerelease  Include pre-release versions in the scan.
  --version             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information
